summary: Frontend-only verification of two changes: (1) Eval credits sidebar indicator visible for admin user in 'unavailable' state (since /api/credits genuinely 404s), and (2) LiveEvalResults 'Test Cases' card moved to bottom-most, full content-width position on the Job Detail page. Both confirmed via Playwright against the live preview with the seeded admin session token. All assertions pass.
critical_code_review_comments: JobDetail.js: LiveEvalResults (line 1853) is correctly placed AFTER the closing of the `grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3` container at line 1847, making it full content-width and bottom-most. Confirmed with DOM check: cardAfterGrid=true, cardInsideGrid=false, no siblings after card.

EvalCredits indicator continues to render for admin users; when /api/credits returns 404 the component shows muted 'unavailable' state with refresh button — no error toast, page remains fully usable. Behavior unchanged from iter 54 verification.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded admin session and existing eval job 485cf087-7b2c-4a76-9f61-508f0be6806b.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Viewport 1920x800. Findings for /evals/485cf087-7b2c-4a76-9f61-508f0be6806b:
- live-eval-results-card present, 9 live-test-row-0-* rows render.
- Position: cardTop=2968.5, gridTop=125, gridBottom=2944.5 → card is below the grid.
- Width: card width=1400 px (left=370, right=1770) matches grid width exactly → full content-width (sidebar ~190px + container padding accounts for remainder of 1920).
- DOM: card is NOT inside the grid container and has zero nextElementSibling → confirmed bottom-most.
- Quick Links (top=126), Details (top=332), Scores (top=906.5) all render and sit above the Test Cases card on the right column / left column respectively. No overlap / regression observed.
- Sidebar footer order observed: MongoDB chip, degraded API health, EVAL CREDITS (showing 'unavailable' + refresh icon), PW Test User (admin) menu, v1.0.0 + theme toggle.
- /api/credits returns 404 (real) → eval-credits-unavailable testid rendered, eval-credits-refresh present, no eval-credits-value (expected), zero error toasts.
- No backend testing performed (skipped per review request).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. Both review-request items met.
